title: Claude Code Skill Frontmatter
description: Schema for SKILL.md YAML frontmatter fields — based on https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it — drives model-invocation triggering

disable-model-invocation.description: Prevent Claude from auto-loading this skill

user-invocable.description: Show in / menu for manual invocation

allowed-tools.description: Comma-separated tool names for permission-free use when skill is active

model.description: Model override when skill is active
